text: A short heroic fable about a village and a wise tree.
caption: Type a prompt to ask the model to write a short heroic fable — shows the app accepts natural-language prompts.
Set the max token length to control how long the model's output can be — important for cost and immediacy.
Click Generate to send the prompt to the server and run the model — demonstrates inference flow.
Wait for the output area to be populated with model text — confirms successful generation.
